name: diag
label: Diagnostics
description: Full system diagnostics (Plan B): performance, crashes, execution traces, config drift, connections, updates — one agent, routed by a tool-family index.

name: perf
label: Performance
description: Slow / stuck / leak / failed-update diagnosis and daily health sweeps (Plan A, part 1).

name: sec
label: Forensics
description: Crash analysis, execution traces, config drift, and suspicious-connection hunting (Plan A, part 2).

name: dtm
label: DTM Engineering
description: DTP build download → install → consent → transmission-verification pipeline (confirm-token gates intact).

name: docs
label: Documents
description: Convert documents to Markdown, OCR field extraction from scans, and write to the Obsidian vault.

name: ops
label: Ops & Scheduling
description: Create and manage scheduled tasks, light computer control, and task-dispatch entry point.
